bio: I work at the intersection of artificial intelligence, robotics, space systems, and defence technology, with a focus on turning advanced technical ideas into operational capability.

My experience spans agentic AI platforms, Earth observation, lunar and planetary robotics, space station robotics, and aerospace systems engineering. Across these domains, I am interested in trustworthy autonomy: systems that can perceive, decide, assist, and operate reliably in complex real-world environments.

focusAreas.title: Artificial Intelligence
focusAreas.description: Agentic AI, machine learning, decision-support systems, and trustworthy autonomy.

focusAreas.title: Robotics
focusAreas.description: Space robotics, autonomous systems, sensing, control, and mission-oriented robotic capability.

focusAreas.title: Space
focusAreas.description: Earth observation, lunar missions, orbital infrastructure, and space-enabled services.

focusAreas.title: Defence
focusAreas.description: Aerospace systems, security-focused technology, operational resilience, and mission-critical engineering.

projects.title: Enterprise Instinct
projects.description: PwC Canada's multi-agent AI platform designed to help organizations deploy, scale, and govern Agentic AI systems.

projects.title: CISERES
projects.description: AI-enabled satellite capability for disaster management that turns EO data into near real-time alerts for faster response.

projects.title: ExoMars "Rosalind Franklin" Rover
projects.description: European rover for Mars exploration, equipped with advanced sensing and decision-making capabilities to navigate the harsh Martian environment.

projects.title: MoonNet
projects.description: Deep-learning inference payload intended to run on a lunar mission, demonstrating on-board AI processing for spaceflight imagery.

projects.title: Canadarm2 (International Space Station)
projects.description: NASA and Canadian Space Agency led International Space Station robotics program work focused on logistics and support engineering for a flight-proven robotic system.

projects.title: OpenSAR Insight
projects.description: European Space Agency project to develop AI algorithms for Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) data analysis to detect and classify objects in Earth observation imagery.

projects.title: F-35 Joint Strike Fighter
projects.description: Power and Thermal Management System (PTMS) engineering for the F-35, supporting reliable electrical power distribution and thermal performance in a safety-critical fighter aircraft environment.
